description: Create a new GL Budget for the GardenWorld client. Set the Name to '2025 Operating Budget' and the Description to 'Annual operating expense budget for fiscal year 2025'. Include three budget lines: an account containing 'Telephone' with an amount of 18000, an account containing 'Office Supplies' with an amount of 12000, and an account containing 'Utilities' with an amount of 24000.

metadata.expected_description: Annual operating expense budget for fiscal year 2025
